content.problemStatement:
Given two strings AAA and BBB, each of length NNN, where string BBB is a permutation of string AAA.

You can perform the following operation on string AAA:


Break string AAA into 333 substrings (may be empty) S1S_1S1тАЛ, S2S_2S2тАЛ, and S3S_3S3тАЛ such that S1+S2+S3=AS_1+S_2+S_3=AS1тАЛ+S2тАЛ+S3тАЛ=A, where тИгS1тИг,тИгS2тИг,тИгS3тИгтЙе0|S_1|, |S_2|, |S_3| \ge 0тИгS1тАЛтИг,тИгS2тАЛтИг,тИгS3тАЛтИгтЙе0;
Replace AAA with S3+S2+S1S_3+S_2+S_1S3тАЛ+S2тАЛ+S1тАЛ.
Note that, +++ denotes the concatenation of two strings and тИгSтИг|S|тИгSтИг denotes the length of the string SSS.

You have to convert string AAA to string BBB by performing **no more than** NNN operations.


Input Format

The first line of input contains a single integer TTT - the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains an integer NNN - the length of strings AAA and BBB.
The second line of each test case contains a string AAA of length NNN.
The third line of each test case contains a string BBB of length NNN.


Output Format

For the first line of each test case output an integer MMM - the number of operations you performed. Note that MMM must be less than equal to NNN.
Print MMM lines. In each line, output 333 space-separated integers denoting the length of substrings S1S_1S1тАЛ, S2S_2S2тАЛ and S3S_3S3тАЛ. Note that for all operations тИгS1тИг+тИгS2тИг+тИгS3тИг=N|S_1| + |S_2| + |S_3| = NтИгS1тАЛтИг+тИгS2тАЛтИг+тИгS3тАЛтИг=N.
constraints: Strings AAA and BBB contains lowercase latin letters only.
String AAA and BBB are permutaions of each other.
Sum of NNN does not exceed 300030003000 over all test cases.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test Case 111: String AAA can be converted to string BBB by performing operations in following manner -

Operation 111 - S1=S_1=S1тАЛ= "d", S2=S_2=S2тАЛ= "cb", and S3=S_3=S3тАЛ= "a", replace AAA with S3+S2+S1S_3+S_2+S_1S3тАЛ+S2тАЛ+S1тАЛ. AAA becomes "acbd".
Operation 222 - S1=S_1=S1тАЛ= "", S2=S_2=S2тАЛ= "ac", and S3=S_3=S3тАЛ= "bd", replace AAA with S3+S2+S1S_3+S_2+S_1S3тАЛ+S2тАЛ+S1тАЛ. AAA becomes "bdac".



Test Case 222: String AAA can be converted to string BBB by performing operations in following manner -

Operation 111 - S1=S_1=S1тАЛ= "a", S2=S_2=S2тАЛ= "b", and S3=S_3=S3тАЛ= "c", replace AAA with S3+S2+S1S_3+S_2+S_1S3тАЛ+S2тАЛ+S1тАЛ. AAA becomes "cba".
